subcategory: Animated wave chart with split line path
use_cases: Displaying animated wave data visualizations in analytics dashboards
Creating decorative flowing line backgrounds for landing pages
Showing temporal data with smooth sinusoidal patterns
Building animated data storytelling components for media sites
Implementing decorative flow elements in fintech applications
ai_summary: An animated split line path visualization component using @visx libraries to render smooth sinusoidal wave patterns. Supports multiple directions (left-to-right, right-to-left, top-to-bottom, bottom-to-top) and gradient fills. Ideal for dashboards, analytics interfaces, or decorative animated backgrounds where flowing data visualization adds visual interest.
